sentences.target: Ce maudit bus arrive encore en retard.
sentences.reading: /sə modi bys aʁiv ɑ̃kɔʁ ɑ̃ ʁətaʁ/

translations.fr: Ce maudit bus arrive encore en retard.
translations.ipa: /sə modi bys aʁiv ɑ̃kɔʁ ɑ̃ ʁətaʁ/
translations.en: This damn bus is late again.
translations.es: Ese maldito autobús vuelve a llegar tarde.
translations.de: Dieser verdammte Bus ist schon wieder zu spät.
translations.it: Questo maledetto autobus è di nuovo in ritardo.
translations.ko: 이 망할 버스가 또 늦게 온다.
translations.zh-Hans: 这该死的公交车又晚点了。
translations.yue: 呢架該死嘅巴士又遲到。
translations.pt: Esse maldito ônibus está atrasado de novo.
translations.tr: Bu lanet olası otobüs yine geç kalıyor.
translations.vi: Cái xe buýt chết tiệt này lại trễ nữa.
translations.ar: هذه الحافلة الملعونة تتأخر مرة أخرى.
translations.nl: Die verdomde bus is weer te laat.
translations.hu: Ez az átkozott busz megint késik.
translations.hi: यह कमबख्त बस फिर देर से आ रही है.
translations.pl: Ten cholerny autobus znowu się spóźnia.
translations.el: Αυτό το καταραμένο λεωφορείο αργεί πάλι.
translations.nb: Denne forbaska bussen er forsinket igjen.
translations.sv: Den förbannade bussen är sen igen.
translations.cs: Ten zatracený autobus má zase zpoždění.
translations.da: Den forbandede bus er forsinket igen.
translations.fi: Tuo kirottu bussi on taas myöhässä.
translations.ja: このいまいましいバスはまた遅れている.

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner (masc. sg.) modifying the noun phrase; deictic reference to a specific bus.
Evaluative adjective (masc. sg.) preposed to the noun for emphasis; agrees with 'bus'.
Common noun (masc. sg.); subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject 'bus'.
Adverb modifying the verb; expresses persistence/repetition of the action.
Preposition introducing the noun 'retard'; part of the fixed adverbial expression 'en retard'.
Common noun complement of 'en'; with 'en' forms the idiom 'en retard' meaning 'late'.

sentences.target: J'en ai marre de ce maudit bruit.
sentences.reading: /ʒɑ̃ n‿e maʁ də sə modi bʁɥi/

translations.fr: J'en ai marre de ce maudit bruit.
translations.ipa: /ʒɑ̃ n‿e maʁ də sə modi bʁɥi/
translations.en: I'm fed up with that damn noise.
translations.es: Estoy harto de ese maldito ruido.
translations.de: Ich habe diesen verdammten Lärm satt.
translations.it: Sono stufo di quel maledetto rumore.
translations.zh-Hans: 我受够了那该死的噪音。
translations.yue: 我受夠嗰啲該死嘅嘈音。
translations.vi: Tôi chán ngấy cái tiếng ồn chết tiệt đó.
translations.nl: Ik ben dat verdomde lawaai zat.
translations.hu: Elegem van abból az átkozott zajból.
translations.hi: मैं उस कमबख्त शोर से तंग आ गया हूँ.
translations.el: Έχω βαρεθεί αυτόν τον καταραμένο θόρυβο.
translations.nb: Jeg er lei av den forbaska støyen.
translations.id: Aku muak dengan suara bising sialan itu.
translations.sv: Jag är trött på det där förbannade oljudet.
translations.ro: M-am săturat de zgomotul ăla blestemat.
translations.cs: Mám už dost toho zatraceného hluku.
translations.da: Jeg er træt af den forbandede larm.
translations.ja: あの忌々しい騒音にはもううんざりだ.

tokens.explanation: Clitic cluster: subject clitic 'je' elided before vowel + partitive/oblique clitic 'en' ('of it/them'); precedes the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st person singular; lexical 'avoir' in the idiom 'en avoir marre' ('to be fed up').
Noun serving as the object of 'avoir' in the fixed expression 'en avoir marre'.
Preposition introducing the complement that specifies what one is fed up with.
Demonstrative determiner (masc. sg.) for the following noun.
Adjective (masc. sg.) preposed for emphasis; modifies 'bruit'.
Common noun (masc.); object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Elle évite ce coin maudit la nuit.
sentences.reading: /ɛl evit sə kwɛ̃ modi la nɥi/

translations.fr: Elle évite ce coin maudit la nuit.
translations.ipa: /ɛl evit sə kwɛ̃ modi la nɥi/
translations.en: She avoids that cursed spot at night.
translations.es: Ella evita ese rincón maldito por la noche.
translations.de: Sie meidet nachts diese verfluchte Ecke.
translations.ko: 그녀는 밤에는 그 저주받은 구석을 피한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 她晚上避开那个被诅咒的角落。
translations.yue: 佢夜晚避開嗰個被詛咒嘅角落。
translations.ru: Ночью она избегает того проклятого места.
translations.pt: À noite ela evita aquele canto amaldiçoado.
translations.he: בלילה היא נמנעת מהפינה המקוללת הזו.
translations.tr: Gece o lanetli köşeden uzak durur.
translations.vi: Ban đêm cô ấy tránh cái góc bị nguyền rủa đó.
translations.ar: هي تتجنب ذلك الركن الملعون ليلاً.
translations.nl: ’s Nachts mijdt ze die vervloekte hoek.
translations.uk: Вночі вона оминає той проклятий куток.
translations.hu: Éjjel elkerüli azt az elátkozott sarkot.
translations.hi: वह रात में उस शापित कोने से बचती है.
translations.pl: W nocy omija ten przeklęty zakątek.
translations.el: Το βράδυ αποφεύγει εκείνη την καταραμένη γωνία.
translations.nb: Om natten unngår hun det forbannede hjørnet.
translations.id: Malam hari dia menghindari sudut terkutuk itu.
translations.sv: På natten undviker hon det där förbannade hörnet.
translations.cs: V noci se vyhýbá tomu prokletému koutku.
translations.da: Om natten undgår hun det forbandede hjørne.
translations.fi: Öisin hän välttelee sitä kirottua nurkkaa.
translations.ja: 夜はその呪われた角を避けて通る.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; subject of the clause.
Transitive verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Demonstrative determiner (masc. sg.) introducing the noun 'coin'.
Common noun (masc. sg.); direct object of 'évite'.
Adjective (masc. sg.) postposed; agrees with 'coin'.
Definite article (fem. sg.) determining 'nuit'.
Common noun (fem.); the NP 'la nuit' functions as a temporal adverbial ('at night').

sentences.target: On dirait une maison maudite ici.

translations.fr: On dirait une maison maudite ici.
translations.en: It looks like a cursed house here.
translations.de: Es sieht hier aus wie ein verfluchtes Haus.
translations.zh-Hans: 这里看起来像一座被诅咒的房子。
translations.yue: 呢度睇落好似一間被詛咒嘅屋。
translations.ru: Здесь всё выглядит как проклятый дом.
translations.he: כאן זה נראה כמו בית מקולל.
translations.tr: Burası sanki lanetli bir ev gibi görünüyor.
translations.vi: Ở đây trông cứ như một ngôi nhà bị nguyền rủa.
translations.nl: Het lijkt hier wel een vervloekt huis.
translations.uk: Тут усе виглядає як проклятий будинок.
translations.hu: Itt úgy néz ki, mint egy elátkozott ház.
translations.hi: यहाँ तो लगता है जैसे कोई शापित घर हो.
translations.nb: Det ser ut som et forbannet hus her.
translations.id: Di sini terlihat seperti rumah terkutuk.
translations.sv: Här ser det ut som ett förbannat hus.
translations.ro: Aici arată ca o casă blestemată.
translations.cs: Tady to vypadá jako prokletý dům.
translations.da: Her ligner det et forbandet hus.
translations.fi: Täällä näyttää siltä kuin talo olisi kirottu.
translations.ja: ここは呪われた家みたいに見える.

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun; generic reference.
Verb, conditional present 3rd person singular; in the expression 'On dirait...' conveys impression/appearance ('looks like').
Indefinite article (fem. sg.) determining 'maison'.
Common noun (fem.); predicate-like complement in the small clause after 'dirait'.
Adjective (fem. sg.) agreeing with 'maison'; postnominal.
Locative adverb modifying the clause; indicates the place.
